ui.warning.cleardata.title: Clear Data
ui.warning.cleardata.text:
This action will clear all of your collection, player and run data. It will not clear your achievements, stats or leaderboard placements.
This action is irreversible. Are you sure?
ui.warning.tutorial.title: Tutorial
ui.warning.tutorial.text:
This action will load the battle tutorial.
Do you wish to continue?
ui.warning.tutorial.firsttime.title: Tutorial
ui.warning.tutorial.firsttime.text:
It appears it is your first time playing the game!
Would you like to play the tutorial?
